Join.metaTitle: Bookkeepers & Staff Accountants — See Your Pay Range Before You Apply — Meridian
Join.metaDescription: Apply to work with US CPA and bookkeeping firms through Meridian. Pay shown upfront, one paid skills assessment, and full visibility into your application status at every stage.
Join.heroHeadline: Bookkeepers and staff accountants — see your pay range before you apply
Join.heroSubheadline: Pay is shown upfront, and you can see exactly where you stand at every stage — no ghosting.
Join.differentiator1: See your pay range before you apply — not after
Join.differentiator2: One assessment, reviewed once — no separate client interview gauntlet
Join.differentiator3: Paid skills assessment — we don't ask for free work
Join.academyTeaser: Every placed bookkeeper and staff accountant has access to an ongoing training track: GAAP fundamentals, QuickBooks/Xero certification, and close-process training. It's built to be a credential on your resume, not a one-time onboarding video.
Join.applicationSubheadline: See the pay range first, then a few quick questions.

Academy.metaTitle: Meridian Academy — Training & Certification for Placed Talent
Academy.metaDescription: GAAP fundamentals, QuickBooks/Xero certification, and close-process training for bookkeepers and staff accountants placed through Meridian.
Academy.label: Fig. 01 — Meridian Academy
Academy.headline: A credential, not a perk
Academy.intro: Every placed bookkeeper and staff accountant has access to an ongoing training track — built to be a credential on your resume, not a one-time onboarding video.
Academy.track1Body: Core accrual-accounting concepts applied to real US client scenarios, not abstract theory.
Academy.track2Body: Structured certification path in both platforms, recognized across the firms Meridian places into.
Academy.track3Body: Month-end close workflow, from reconciliations through the final close package.

TalentWizard.step1Intro: Here's the pay range before you tell us anything about yourself:
TalentWizard.step1PlaceholderNote: Placeholder pay bands — pending confirmed internal figures
TalentWizard.step2ExperienceQuestion: Years of experience with US-based clients or US GAAP?
TalentWizard.step2SoftwareQuestion: Which software are you proficient in?
TalentWizard.step3TimezoneQuestion: What US timezone hours can you work?
TalentWizard.step3AvailabilityQuestion: Are you currently working with other clients?
TalentWizard.resumePlaceholder: Link to resume, LinkedIn, or portfolio
TalentWizard.nextStepsNote: Next: a short, paid skills assessment (1 hour, compensated at your quoted rate). You'll be able to track your status the whole way through.
TalentWizard.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

StatusTracker.heading: Your application status
StatusTracker.scheduledBody: A short, paid skills assessment (1 hour, compensated at your quoted rate) gets scheduled.
StatusTracker.reviewedBody: Your assessment is reviewed once — no separate client interview gauntlet.
StatusTracker.matchedBody: You're matched with a firm whose hours and software fit your profile.
StatusTracker.matchedTimeframe: Timing depends on current firm demand
